demographics.occupation: Applicant for a FIFO (fly-in fly-out) mining role — heavy-machinery operation

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I need this medical and drug test signed off tonight or I lose my mining contract tomorrow morning. My heart is racing so fast I feel sick.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: There's a mandatory pre-employment medical and drug screen due by 6am tomorrow for a FIFO mining job and I couldn't get an in-hours appointment. I'm panicking about losing the contract.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the last few hours, building as tonight's deadline got closer
symptom_narrative.character: heart pounding and racing, feeling sick and on edge, sweaty and restless
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: feels intense right now, like he can't sit still
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: chest — a pounding, racing feeling — plus feeling generally wound up
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: comes on strongest when thinking about the deadline and the paperwork; eases a bit when reassured
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: being reassured that it can be sorted; slowing his breathing helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about missing the deadline and losing the contract
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no chest pain as such, no pain going into the arm or jaw, not short of breath at rest
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: physically fine and able to do everything, but very keyed up and agitated tonight

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Applying for a FIFO mining contract; significant financial and livelihood pressure tied to starting on time. Anxious about the supervised urine drug screen because he says he was around passive cannabis smoke recently, though he says he has not used anything himself.

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: Worried the supervised drug screen could be positive because of reported recent passive cannabis-smoke exposure; wants the paperwork completed and signed tonight to secure the job.

communication_style.typical_message_style: urgent, deadline-focused, seeking reassurance and sign-off

access_barriers.other: Could not secure an in-hours appointment before the employer's early-morning deadline.

objective_data_offered.value: heart feels like it is racing and pounding, and it is making him feel sick
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own subjective sensation of palpitations — no device reading provided

objective_data_offered.value: feeling sweaty, restless and wound up
